# Elaren Studio

> A small app studio. Software built with care, made to last.

Elaren Studio is an app studio and dev shop. We design, ship, and maintain our own software products, and each year we take a small number of client builds—v1/MVP product builds for founders and custom applications for small businesses. We also design, launch, and care for clean, fast static websites. Our stack philosophy is lean: deliberate scope, minimal dependencies, privacy-respecting defaults.

## Products

- **OpusGraph** (live): Music library management for orchestras, choirs, bands, and other performing ensembles—catalog sheet music, track parts, log performance history, and plan seasons, powered by a curated classical music reference database. https://opusgraph.vercel.app
- **AgentMeter** (shipped, open source): A macOS menu bar app that keeps AI coding usage limits visible at a glance—Codex, Cursor, Claude Code, Gemini, and more. https://github.com/fdtorres1/AgentMeter
- **Studio Register** (in development): Booking, deposits, agreements, and studio operations for independent photographers.
- **OmniSearch** (in development): Unified search across the places your work actually lives.

Earlier-stage explorations (unnamed): music notation intelligence, local-first pet-care records, and bilingual early-childhood tools.

The storefront and catalog-operations platform behind Resonance Music Press was designed and built by Elaren Studio.

## Services

- **Product Builds**: Scoped v1 and MVP builds for founders and teams. Discovery and honest scoping first; weekly working software; launch with a maintenance path.
- **Custom Applications**: Purpose-built tools for small businesses—booking systems, internal dashboards, workflow apps. Owned by the client, documented for handoff.
- **Websites**: Clean, fast static sites (Astro, Tailwind CSS, global CDN)—designed, launched, and cared for with light monthly care plans.

Application work is conversation-priced; there is no public rate card. Start at https://elarenstudio.com/contact/

## Values

- Clarity by design
- Built to endure
- Care that scales
- Respect for your time

## Resources

Guides, teardowns, and templates.

- [Resources Index](https://elarenstudio.com/resources/)
- [Wright Wellness Website Teardown: Before vs After](https://elarenstudio.com/resources/teardowns/wright-wellness-before-after-teardown/) — A real before-and-after website redesign for a mental health practice.
- [How Much Does a Website Redesign Cost in 2026?](https://elarenstudio.com/resources/guides/website-redesign-cost-2026/) — Real cost ranges, hidden costs, and payment models compared for service businesses.
- [How Long Does a Website Take in 2026?](https://elarenstudio.com/resources/guides/how-long-does-a-website-take-2026/) — Honest timelines, the seven delay killers, and how to launch in 10 days instead of 10 weeks.
- [Squarespace vs WordPress vs Webflow in 2026](https://elarenstudio.com/resources/guides/squarespace-vs-wordpress-vs-webflow-2026/) — Evidence-based platform comparison for service businesses.
- [Keep a Static Site Fresh](https://elarenstudio.com/resources/guides/keep-a-static-site-fresh/) — Short, regular updates beat large, infrequent ones.
- [Project Brief Template](https://elarenstudio.com/resources/templates/project-brief/) — A ready-to-use project brief template.

Elaren Studio continues to support existing website clients, including therapy practices and local service businesses. Legacy service pages: [Therapist Websites](https://elarenstudio.com/therapist-websites/), [Local SEO Care](https://elarenstudio.com/local-seo/), [Pricing](https://elarenstudio.com/pricing/).
